name: Xero
description: Xero accounting + payroll — contacts, invoices, quotes, payments, credit notes, bank transactions, items, live reports (P&L, balance sheet, aged debts), employees, leave balances & bookings, timesheets, pay runs. Uses a Xero Custom Connection (client credentials).

settings.label: Client ID
settings.help: From a Xero **Custom Connection** app: developer.xero.com → My Apps → New app → Custom Connection. Authorise it against your organisation.

settings.label: Client secret
settings.help: Generated with the Custom Connection app.

settings.label: Scopes
settings.default: accounting.transactions accounting.contacts accounting.settings accounting.reports.read payroll.settings payroll.employees payroll.timesheets
settings.help: Space-separated. Must match the scopes ticked on the Custom Connection. Drop the payroll.* ones if you don't use Xero Payroll.

settings.label: Tenant ID
settings.help: Leave blank — auto-detected from /connections. Only set to pin a specific organisation.
